preferred_skills: Cost and Latency Optimization for LLM Inference
responsibilities: Design and build production-grade applications powered by large language models such as GPT-4 and Claude
Develop retrieval-augmented generation pipelines that integrate vector databases with LLM inference for accurate responses
Engineer and iterate on prompt templates and chaining strategies to optimize output quality and reliability
Build and maintain APIs and microservices that expose AI capabilities to internal and external applications
Fine-tune and evaluate open-source and proprietary language models against domain-specific benchmarks and datasets
Implement guardrails, evaluation harnesses, and monitoring systems to ensure safe and reliable AI outputs
Collaborate with product managers and designers to translate user needs into AI-powered features and workflows
Optimize inference latency, token usage, and cost across LLM-powered services running at production scale
Architect multi-agent workflows that orchestrate tool use, memory, and reasoning across complex tasks
Stay current with emerging AI research and rapidly prototype new techniques into shippable product features
